_note: The 'formula database' for reading in-game auction slang. Grown over time: the parser flags anything it doesn't understand into a review list, Zak defines the rule, and it gets added here. Coin ratios follow the wiki's base-100 system (1 plat = 100 gold = 10,000 silver = 1,000,000 copper). CONFIRM these ratios.
_abbreviations_help: Map an in-game shorthand to its full item name, e.g. "bcm": "Brilliant Crystallized Magic". Left empty on purpose so unknowns surface in the review list for Zak to define.
